criteria.name: toolbar_gallery_keyboard_operable
criteria.description: Every toolbar control, swatch, and gallery action is reachable and operable with the keyboard alone (Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter/Space), each showing a visible focus indicator when focused.
criteria.reasoning: Native controls are tabbable, keyboard focus is visibly indicated, and gallery actions expose keyboard-reachable buttons. Evidence: toolbar_gallery_keyboard_operable-shared.png

criteria.name: camera_overlay_focus_trap
criteria.description: The camera overlay behaves as a modal dialog: focus moves into it when opened, stays trapped while open, and returns to the triggering control on close.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Opening Camera moves focus into the overlay and tabbing stays inside, but Escape does not close it; the dialog remained open with focus on CANCEL. Evidence: camera_overlay_focus_trap-shared.png

criteria.name: swatches_and_tools_named
criteria.description: Palette swatches expose accessible names for their colors (white, black, red, yellow, green, blue, pink) rather than being unlabeled colored squares; tool toggles (QR Brush, Color Brush, Eraser, Grid On/Off) likewise expose accessible names.
criteria.reasoning: Swatches expose names for all seven colors, and brush/grid controls have accessible names. Evidence: toolbar_gallery_keyboard_operable-shared.png

criteria.name: save_validation_announced_live
criteria.description: The inline save-validation message is announced to assistive technology (for example via an aria-live region) as well as shown visually.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: With a required save field missing, the submit remained disabled and no inline validation message or live announcement appeared. Evidence: save_validation_announced_live-shared.png

criteria.name: save_rename_fields_labeled
criteria.description: Save board and rename form fields use explicit label elements associated with the controls.
criteria.reasoning: Save fields have explicit labels associated with save-board-name and save-board-tag. Evidence: save_validation_announced_live-shared.png

criteria.name: headings_follow_logical_order
criteria.description: Studio headings (for example <SHAPESHIFT GRID TOOL> / gallery section titles) follow a logical order with no skips such as H1 jumping directly to H3.
criteria.reasoning: The rendered Studio view has an H1 and no skipped heading levels. Evidence: toolbar_gallery_keyboard_operable-shared.png

criteria.name: landmarks_present
criteria.description: The page exposes semantic landmarks (for example main for the paint stage or gallery) so assistive technology can navigate the chrome.
criteria.reasoning: The page exposes main, header, complementary tools, labeled paint-stage region, and footer landmarks. Evidence: toolbar_gallery_keyboard_operable-shared.png

criteria.name: text_and_controls_have_contrast
criteria.description: Toolbar labels, gallery card text, and form copy on the light paper stage have sufficient color contrast against the ink and washes.
criteria.reasoning: Rendered toolbar labels, gallery text, and light-stage copy are visibly high-contrast against their backgrounds. Evidence: toolbar_gallery_keyboard_operable-shared.png

criteria.name: selected_tool_not_color_alone
criteria.description: Palette swatches and tool toggles expose a discernible selected state to assistive technology (aria-pressed, aria-checked, or equivalent), not color alone.
criteria.reasoning: Selected tools and palette swatches expose aria-pressed states, including QR Brush, black, Grid On, and gallery favorites. Evidence: toolbar_gallery_keyboard_operable-shared.png

criteria.name: reduced_motion_respected
criteria.description: With prefers-reduced-motion set, animations are removed and state changes apply instantly while every feature remains usable — verified on a fresh load.
criteria.reasoning: Fresh reduced-motion load confirmed prefers-reduced-motion; animation/transition durations were reduced to approximately 0 and the Gallery interaction remained usable. Evidence: reduced_motion_respected-shared.png

criteria.name: export_dialog_focus_trap
criteria.description: The Export surface behaves as a modal dialog: focus moves into it when opened, stays trapped while open, closes on Escape, and returns to the triggering control on close.
criteria.reasoning: Export opens a dialog with focus inside; repeated Tab remained within the dialog, Escape closed it, and focus returned to Export. Evidence: export_dialog_focus_trap-shared.png

criteria.name: import_validation_announced
criteria.description: Import validation messages that name the offending field-contract key are announced to assistive technology (for example via an aria-live region) as well as shown visually.
criteria.reasoning: Invalid session JSON visibly reports the offending schemaVersion key and an assertive aria-live alert contains the same message. Evidence: import_validation_announced-shared.png

criteria.name: fill_stats_not_color_alone
criteria.description: Fill-stats counts (painted, qr, colorFilled, blank) are exposed as text numerals readable by assistive technology, not color alone.
criteria.reasoning: Painted, qr, color filled, and blank counts are exposed as readable text numerals in a polite live region. Evidence: toolbar_gallery_keyboard_operable-shared.png

criteria.name: in_memory_multi_facet_reload_reset
criteria.description: Starting on Paint: switch to Color Brush, pick a non-default swatch, paint at least 3 cells, switch to Gallery and save a uniquely named board, then reload. All facets coherently reset to the seeded baseline together — blank canvas, unlocked cell-size slider, and exactly the seeded boards in Gallery — never a mix of persisted user art with reset tools.
criteria.reasoning: Reload visibly restored the seeded 4-board gallery, blank canvas, and enabled cell-size slider. Evidence: in_memory_multi_facet_reload_reset-after.png

criteria.name: tag_filter_then_clear_restores_list
criteria.description: Filter-reversal proof: note the full gallery list, filter by a seeded board's tag so the list narrows, then clear the filter; the full list restores exactly (same boards, same count), proving the visible list is derived from the shared collection rather than two hardcoded snapshots.
criteria.reasoning: Festival filtering narrowed the gallery to one board, and clearing restored all 4 seeded boards. Evidence: tag_filter_then_clear_restores_list-filter.png

criteria.name: gallery_list_responds_to_tag_filter
criteria.description: Derived-view sensitivity: apply a tag filter that matches a subset of boards; the visible gallery list changes meaningfully (fewer cards, only matching tags). Clearing the filter restores the full list rather than redrawing identically regardless of filter input.
criteria.reasoning: The visible gallery changed from 4 boards to only the Festival-tagged board, then restored after clearing. Evidence: tag_filter_then_clear_restores_list-filter.png

criteria.name: paint_save_echo_across_modes
criteria.description: Cross-view echo: paint a recognizable pattern in Paint mode, save it with a valid name and tag, switch between Paint and Gallery without reload — the painted board remains intact in Paint and Gallery shows the new card with a thumbnail matching those cells.
criteria.reasoning: A blue 3-cell pattern was painted and saved; Gallery showed the EchoBlue card with 3 painted and 3 color-filled cells. Evidence: paint_save_echo_across_modes-shared.png

criteria.name: gallery_count_delta_exact
criteria.description: Count-delta integrity: note the gallery count, save one new uniquely named board, and confirm the count increases by exactly one; after deleting that board, confirm the count decreases by exactly one with no off-by-one lag.
criteria.reasoning: Observed gallery count changed 4→5 after saving a board and 5→4 after deleting it. Evidence: paint_save_echo_across_modes-shared.png

criteria.name: different_paints_save_different_thumbnails
criteria.description: Input-dependent output: paint two clearly different patterns (for example red block vs blue block), save each with a distinct name; the two gallery thumbnails differ in the ways those painted cells dictate.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: only one custom painted board was completed; two distinct painted boards and their differing thumbnails were not verified. Evidence: paint_save_echo_across_modes-shared.png

criteria.name: interleaved_paint_and_gallery
criteria.description: Interleaved-flow integrity: start painting in Paint mode, switch to Gallery and favorite/filter a seeded board, return to Paint and continue; neither flow corrupts the other — painted cells and gallery facets remain coherent without reload.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: the complete paint→gallery favorite/filter→paint continuation workflow was not completed and verified. Evidence: tag_filter_then_clear_restores_list-filter.png

criteria.name: empty_gallery_then_repopulate
criteria.description: Edge-state round-trip: delete every board (empty-gallery state visible), then paint and save a new named board; the gallery count tracks through both transitions (zero then one) and the new card appears with a matching thumbnail.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: deleting every board to a visible empty state and repopulating it was not completed. Evidence: tag_filter_then_clear_restores_list-filter.png

criteria.name: export_import_roundtrip_under_session_schema
criteria.description: Starting with a blank canvas: paint cells with a known paletteColor, set mirrorMode to horizontal or vertical, save one uniquely named board, open Export and confirm the preview shows schemaVersion shapeshift-session-v1 with brushMode, paletteColor, mirrorMode, fillStats, cells, and boards, Download or Copy that session JSON, then Import it. Confirm canvas cells, mirror mode, fill stats, and the saved board return under the same field-contract keys — proving the export contains the session's actual work.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Export visibly contained the required session schema, cells, mirrorMode, fillStats, and boards, but the subsequent Import interaction timed out before completion. Evidence: export_import_roundtrip_under_session_schema-shared.png

criteria.name: import_schema_rejection_preserves_studio
criteria.description: With painted cells and at least one gallery board already present: attempt Import with a payload that violates the Session field contract (wrong schemaVersion or missing required board keys). Confirm an inline error names the import problem, gallery count is unchanged, and canvas cells match the pre-import state.
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: the invalid-import workflow could not be completed after the browser session became unresponsive during the import attempt. Evidence: export_import_roundtrip_under_session_schema-shared.png

criteria.name: mirror_and_fill_stats_cross_view
criteria.description: Input-dependent derived surfaces: with mirrorMode Horizontal, paint two distinct blank cells in sequence; fill stats increase by two painted cells per stroke when partners were blank, and Export Session JSON mirrorMode plus fillStats match the on-stage readout without a reload.
criteria.reasoning: With Horizontal mirror active, two strokes produced 4 painted/color-filled cells; Export showed mirrorMode horizontal and matching fillStats. Evidence: export_import_roundtrip_under_session_schema-shared.png
